info.title: IDLImporter. Creates .NET interfaces from an IDL file.
info.description:
Copyright (c) 2002-2022, SIL International. All Rights Reserved.
Syntax: IDLImp.dll [options] file.idl
possible options:
/o outfile	name of created file (Default: file.cs)
/c configfile	name of XML configuration file (IDLImp.xml)
/i idhfile	name of IDH file for comments (Default: none)
/n namespace	Namespace of the file to be produced
/u namespace	additional using namespaces
/r jsonfile	File name of .json file to use to resolve references
/x (0|1)	1= create, 0= suppress XML comments (Default: 1)
/? 		show this help information
